properties.name: mcp.plus.enabled
properties.description: Whether MCP Plus auto-exposure is enabled.

properties.name: mcp.plus.base-packages
properties.description: Base packages to scan. Empty means all beans.

properties.name: mcp.plus.bean-types
properties.description: Bean types to scan: CONTROLLER, SERVICE, or ALL.

properties.name: mcp.plus.javadoc-enabled
properties.description: Whether to parse Javadoc at runtime.

properties.name: mcp.plus.include-method-patterns
properties.description: Method name regex patterns to include.

properties.name: mcp.plus.server-type
properties.description: MCP server type override. When unset, reads spring.ai.mcp.server.type.

properties.name: mcp.plus.exclude-method-patterns
properties.description: Method name regex patterns to exclude.

properties.name: mcp.plus.stateless
properties.description: Whether MCP server runs in stateless mode. When unset, reads spring.ai.mcp.server.protocol.

properties.name: mcp.plus.exclude-class-patterns
properties.description: Fully-qualified class name regex patterns to exclude.

properties.name: mcp.plus.duplicate-tool-name-strategy
properties.description: Strategy when duplicate tool names are detected.

properties.name: mcp.plus.debug
properties.description: Log detailed filter decisions at DEBUG level.

properties.name: mcp.plus.inheritance-dedup-strategy
properties.description: Strategy for deduplicating methods in inheritance hierarchies.
